The houses of BrShmanas and other classes should be located
in the northern, eastern, southern and western parts respectively of
villages and towns. The houses are to be constructed in such a
manner that for the people who enter the courtyard the houses lie
to their right.
[The four classes are given the four quarters beginning with
the north in regular order. The courtyard should be so con-
structed that when you enter it the house lies to your right : If the
house faces the east, the gate leading to the court should be in the
north; if it faces the south, the gate should be in the easi; if the
west, in the south; and if the north, in the west.]
